title: CISA & International Partners Release Guide to Secure Adoption of Agentic AI | CISA
publisher: US CISA (with ASD ACSC, NSA, FBI, UK/CA/NZ/DE/NL partners)
excerpt: Joint guide 'Careful Adoption of Agentic AI Services' from CISA with ASD ACSC and partners: security challenges/risks of agentic AI and recommended mitigations for designers, vendors and operators.
